text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! First shrine of the year! Let's go pray and
get hyped for this year! Things are gonna be liiit!
choice_data_list:
You've gotten pretty good at using all that
slang.

You've gotten pretty good at using all that
slang.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I sure have! My bestie squad has been a big help
with that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And check it out! I'm in my senior year now! It's
about time we go get the crowds hyped in the
biggest events!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've accumulated a good number of wins, and
we were able to watch Oguri Cap in action at the
end of last year...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer has experienced a lot, and I'm sure
she'll be able to put all she's learned into good
use this year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: By the way, it just occurred to me, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Do you think it'd be better for us to pray to party
gods instead of regular gods?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I mean, there are plenty of Umamusume
down here on Earth who are practically party
gods themselves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whaddya think? Should we give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose she has a point. Modern problems may
require modern solutions... like praying to party
gods.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's head out to meet our new patrons!
But hold up. There are tons of different party
gods, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There are some who know exactly how to live it
up, and others who've got looksmaxxing down
pat... Who do you think we should pray to?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among the wide array of party gods we choose
from, I think the one Mejiro Palmer should pray to
as she's coming into her own is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Helios's goddess? ...Oh wait, you mean that Horsegirl she's basically got a crush on? Helios does worship the ground at her feet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like, Helios was literally just crying about how her
bae left her on read. What was her name again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Divine Rubert? Something like that? Welp, I can't
remember it, but I guess I'll go pray to her and
see how things go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Divine" certainly has a goddessy ring to it, but
Rubert?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, there she is! That's gotta be her, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Omigosh, there's no way her name is Rubert! She's too cute! She looks just like a doll!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's go say hi.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nuh-uh, no way! Her cuteness is so off the charts,
I've got super cold feet now. I'm good just
admiring her from afar.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wow... She's, like, perfect. Just looking at her is
soothing my spirit...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us offer up prayers from a distance.
Doing so actually makes us feel like our hearts
and minds are blessed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: The mother of partyers? Hm, I guess we party gals have been around for ages.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But, if we're talkin' about the mother of all party
lovers...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hiya, Palmer! Come on, let's cut a rug! ♪ Cha,
cha, cha! Wahoo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the mother of all partyers is
Maruzensky, a high-energy Umamusume with a
love for all things retro.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, what's popping? You wanna ask me
something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen, could you teach me first-gen slang from
the golden days?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
First-gen slang from the golden days? Well,
there's superfly, neat, and grody!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Talk to the hand, wicked, and cowabunga! Oh,
and totally tubular!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, none made any sense to me, but the hype
is real! So this is where it all began...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I think that worked! I feel totally stoked!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We take in Maruzensky's bubbly expression, and
Mejiro Palmer seems a bit stronger for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The goddess of billiards... Huh, yeah, I guess
there'd be suave and sharp goddesses, even
among the party gods.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
'Kay, let's go check out some pool tables and see
who we can find.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So you're the one who wants pointers on how to
play billiards, Palmer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah. Wow, the party vibes here are totes
different to what I'm used to...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Billiards is all about strategy. You let your
opponents hit the balls however they like, and
catch 'em off guard out in the end.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
But that's not my style. I like to get up in their
face and never let 'em take a shot. You're the
same, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, how'd we get here? Are you just gonna
keep steamrolling me like this ooor...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under the party god (?) and living billiard legend
Sirius Symboli's tutelage, Mejiro Palmer learns
how to be an aggressive billiards player.
